code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Groupware_IssueTracker)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {Groupware_WikiPage] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (Groupware_IssueTracker)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (Groupware_SprintBacklog)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (Groupware_KanbanBoard)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (Groupware_IssueTracker)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (Groupware_IssueTracker)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (Groupware_WikiPage)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog]
        CompletedOperational --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog]
        Cancelled --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]
        FailedToEnter --> [Groupware_WikiPage]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [Groupware_KanbanBoard]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (Groupware_ChatRoom)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {Groupware_WikiPage] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (Groupware_KanbanBoard)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (Groupware_KanbanBoard)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (Groupware_KanbanBoard)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (Groupware_IssueTracker)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (Groupware_IssueTracker)
      - Cancelled (Groupware_SprintBacklog)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (Groupware_WikiPage)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (Groupware_WikiPage) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (Groupware_SprintBacklog) can influence ExitedLot (Groupware_SprintBacklog) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Easy Park Plus系统绘制一个完整的状态图，核心是区分车辆进场的运营状态（VisitOperational）和财务结算的计费状态（VisitBilling）。这两个流程是并行管理的，但最终要联动。
明白。这两个状态机是独立的还是嵌套的？从描述看像是两个顶层并行状态，用stateDiagram-v2的复合状态来表达？
对，两个顶层复合状态，分别叫VisitOperationalStatus和VisitBillingStatus。运营侧从Planned开始，计费侧从PendingPriceQuote开始。
好的，我先搭建两个复合状态的框架。运营状态这边，Planned之后车辆接近停车场会进入PendingEntry状态？
没错，PendingEntry是关键节点。这里有两个分支：ANPR识别成功则进入EnteredLot，如果超时未入场则转为Cancelled。另外还要考虑技术故障导致的FailedToEnter。
Cancelled和FailedToEnter都是终止态吗？它们之后流向哪里？
Cancelled结束后进入Groupware_ChatRoom做客服跟进，FailedToEnter进入Groupware_WikiPage记录故障。这些是外部系统的协作节点，用指向方括号的虚线终点表示。
已添加。EnteredLot之后是ActiveInLot，表示车辆已在场内但可能还没分配车位？
对，ActiveInLot是个枢纽状态。车辆可能直接有车位（SlotAssigned），也可能需要等待分配（AwaitingSlotAssignment）。后者用Groupware_KanbanBoard来跟踪排队。
SlotAssigned之后如果车辆离开车位，应该能回到ActiveInLot变成自由漫游状态？另外从任何状态最终都要能离场。
正确。SlotAssigned可以回到ActiveInLot，也可以直接到ExitedLot。ActiveInLot也能直接离场。ExitedLot之后是CompletedOperational，进入Groupware_SprintBacklog归档。
运营状态还需要异常处理吗？比如系统故障或车辆滞留。
需要Interrupted状态作为中断枢纽。EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都可能中断。Interrupted可以手动放行到ExitedLot，也可能变成Abandoned（车辆遗弃），或者紧急疏散到EmergencyEvacuated。
运营侧基本完整了。现在处理计费状态VisitBilling，从PendingPriceQuote开始，触发条件是Visit Started？
对，PendingPriceQuote等待定价服务响应，收到后进入PriceQuoteReceived。然后客户确认价格进入PendingPayment，发起支付后变成PaymentInProgress。
支付成功是PaymentConfirmed，然后到BillingFinalized_Paid。支付失败PaymentFailed应该能重试？
是的，PaymentFailed可以回到PendingPayment重试，或者多次失败后进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention人工介入。人工介入后可能结清（BillingFinalized_Paid）也可能挂账（BillingFinalized_Unpaid）。
BillingFinalized_Paid和BillingFinalized_Unpaid的后续流向？
Paid进入Groupware_ChatRoom通知客服完成，Unpaid进入Groupware_SprintBacklog做后续催收或坏账处理。
还有豁免流程吗？比如免费时段或会员权益。
有，PendingPriceQuote可以直接到GraceExempt_NoCharge，然后直接BillingFinalized_Paid。这个用Groupware_KanbanBoard标记豁免原因。
两个状态机都画完了。需要加注释说明各状态列表吗？
需要，在VisitOperational右侧加注释列出所有运营状态，VisitBilling右侧也加注释。另外标题定为Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Groupware_IssueTracker)。
注释已添加。检查发现EmergencyEvacuated还没指定流向，应该是终止态？
对，EmergencyEvacuated进入Groupware_KanbanBoard做紧急事件后续处理。另外Abandoned也进入Groupware_SprintBacklog。
运营状态里ActiveInLot到AwaitingSlotAssignment的转换条件，和反向转换SlotAssigned到ActiveInLot，这两个都用Groupware_IssueTracker标记？
不对，ActiveInLot到AwaitingSlotAssignment应该是Groupware_KanbanBoard，表示排队等待。只有SlotAssigned回到ActiveInLot（车辆离开车位变自由漫游）才用Groupware_IssueTracker记录。
已修正。再确认一下，PendingEntry到EnteredLot的转换标注是Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened，这个长度合适吗？
可以，保持完整描述。另外Planned到PendingEntry标注Vehicle Nearing Lot (Groupware_IssueTracker)，这是地理围栏触发的。
检查到PriceQuoteReceived也能直接进入RequiresManualBillingIntervention，这是价格计算错误或争议的情况？
对，客户对报价有异议时直接人工介入。另外RequiresManualBillingIntervention到BillingFinalized_Paid的转换需要标注Manual resolution leads to payment。
所有转换标注已完善。最后确认一下并行状态的关系：ExitedLot和PaymentConfirmed之间有潜在联动，但图里不画直接连线？
对，概念上ExitedLot常触发最终计费，PaymentConfirmed可能影响放行，但时序不同步，用注释说明即可，不画硬连线。注释里注明VisitOperational是Visit Lifecycle Management，VisitBilling是Financial Lifecycle Management。
注释已添加。整体结构检查：两个复合状态、13个运营子状态、10个计费子状态、所有Groupware系统标注、异常处理分支、紧急疏散路径，都完整了。
CompletedOperational的Groupware标注检查一下，应该是Groupware_IssueTracker还是SprintBacklog？
发现写的是Groupware_SprintBacklog，但注释里写的是Groupware_IssueTracker。统一用Groupware_SprintBacklog，因为这是归档完结的访问记录，不是活跃问题。
同意。另外GraceExempt_NoCharge到BillingFinalized_Paid的标注目前是空的，需要补上(Groupware_IssueTracker)。
已补上。最终检查：所有方括号终点都是Groupware系统，状态名使用驼峰或特定大小写，转换条件描述清晰。图可以定稿了。
很好。这个状态图覆盖了正常流程、异常中断、紧急疏散、计费豁免和人工介入，各团队协作系统也标注清楚了。可以输出最终版本。
最终Mermaid代码已生成，包含标题、两个复合状态机、完整的状态转换、Groupware系统协作标注、右侧状态列表注释，以及并行管理的说明注释。
确认无误。这个图可以直接用于技术评审和开发排期了。
